description:
Offered: every two years
Art History. This course is a survey of the art and artifacts produced in Europe and the Middle East from the prehistoric through the medieval periods. Special attention is paid to the cultural function of art, and the fascination these distant cultures exert on the modern era. This course explores how “art” is defined and understood in ways very different from our own modern Western definitions, and investigates how images create, maintain, and re-interpret cultural norms.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): DP, FA
